creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Created attachment 149618
Output of "make package" in print/tex-formats

Trying to build kde4 failed for me in print/tex-formats -- none of the files listed in the port's pkg-plist were found under work/stage/

In fact, there were no files there AT ALL (though there are some directories and symbolic links). Trying to "make package" for the print/tex-formats itself yields the same results. I'm attaching the build log...

The already installed ports with "tex" in them are listed below:

gettext-0.18.3.1_1
gettext-msghack-0.2
libexttextcat-3.4.4
libtextcat-2.2_6
p5-Locale-Maketext-Simple-0.21
p5-Locale-gettext-1.05_3
php5-gettext-5.4.35
tex-kpathsea-6.2.0
texi2html-5.0_1,1
texinfo-5.2.20140808
texlive-texmf-20140525_4
